---
title: "kervel"
author: "Thuy Nguyen"
date: "5/2/2022"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
gaussian_ker <- function(u)dnorm(u)
  
ker_box <-function(u) {ifelse(abs(u) <=1,1, 0)}
ker_Epanechnikov<- function(u){ifelse(abs(u) <=1,(3/4)*(1-u^2), 0)}
```

```{r}
poly <- function(x,y,ker, bw, xnew){
 n = length(x)
  m <- length(newx)
  pred <- rep(NA, length(newx))
  
  # Weight
  W <- sapply(x, function(xj){kernel((newx-xj)/h)})
  
  for ( i in 1: length(newx)){
   X <-model.matrix(~poly(((x - newx[i])/h), K, raw = T))
    
    w <- diag(W[i,])
     
    #beta <- solve(t(X) %*% w %*% (X)) %*% t(X) %*% w %*%(y)
    beta = solve(t(X) %*% w %*% (X),t(X) %*% w %*%(y))
      
      pred[i] <-beta[1]
  } 
 pred
}

```







# optimal bandwidth : using CV

```{r}
CV <- function(x,y,H){
  
  ord<- order(x)
  x <- x[ord]
  y<- y[ord]
  
  fold <-as.integer(cut(sample(1:length(x)), breaks = 5, labels= 1:5))
  
  mse <- function(h){
    e <- 1:5
    for (i in 1:5){
      e[i] <- sum((y[fold ==i] - local_poly(x[fold == -i],y[fold==-i], K, h = h,kernel = dnorm, newx=x[fold ==i]))^2)
    }
    return(mean(e))
  }
  MSE <- sapply(H, mse(h))
  
  H[which.min(MSE)]
  
  
 
}
```
